title: 4.5.0 breaks native overlay support
body:
### Issue Description

I have upgraded my system on Archlinux, that updated podman from `4.4.4` to `4.5.0`. After reboot, my rootless containers didn't come up. 

> Apr 23 23:57:36 podman[4621]: Error: kernel does not support overlay fs: kernel returned unlinkat /home/xxx/.local/share/containers

In fact, doing `podman info` provided: 

```
  graphDriverName: overlay
  graphOptions: {}
  graphRoot: /home/xxx/.local/share/containers/storage
  graphRootAllocated: 2170820886528
  graphRootUsed: 5813960704
  graphStatus:
    Backing Filesystem: zfs
    Native Overlay Diff: "false"
    Supports d_type: "true"
    Using metacopy: "false"
```

`Linux xxx 6.1.25-1-lts #1 SMP PREEMPT_DYNAMIC Thu, 20 Apr 2023 14:01:39 +0000 x86_64 GNU/Linux`

Reverting to `4.4.4` brings back native support for `overlay` and everything works again

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Upgrade to podman 4.5.0 on Arch Linux
2. Reboot system
3. Kernel won't start beacause of missing native overlay support


### Describe the results you received

Rootless containers stopped working

### Describe the results you expected

Rootless containers would keep working

comments.body:
What is your zfs version? Looking for the error source in the code I found this change: https://github.com/containers/storage/commit/53ed2821256f900b7f37c5bbc03fbe3871761eff
cc @nalind

```
❯ pacman -Qs zfs
local/zfs-dkms 2.1.11-1 (archzfs-dkms)
    Kernel modules for the Zettabyte File
    System.
local/zfs-utils 2.1.11-1 (archzfs-linux)
    Kernel module support files for the
    Zettabyte File System.
```

Based on the description in the commit it looks like it never worked correctly so now we have a check which should incompatible file system from being used. Proper support should land in zfs 2.2, https://github.com/openzfs/zfs/issues/8648.
I think you have to switch to fuse-overlayfs or the native zfs storage driver (not sure of that works rootless).
